steps.title: Recognize the 'Still' pivot
steps.content:
The word Still in the final sentence signals a concession-then-pivot structure: an objection is acknowledged, then pivoted from.
The blank transition must introduce that acknowledged objection.

steps.title: 'Of course' marks the expected concession
steps.content:
Of course introduces an expected acknowledgment that the designs couldn't grow in a forest — the concession from which the Still pivots when reasserting the presence of natural influences.
Furthermore, Similarly, and Thus all fail to introduce this concessive acknowledgment.
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
